features.name: DPI-C exported task with string input parameter
features.description: Code should include an exported DPI-C task that declares a string-typed input parameter, exercising the DPI boundary for string passing

features.name: readmemh with string variable filename from DPI task
features.description: Code should include a call to $readmemh where the filename argument is a string variable received as a DPI-C task input parameter rather than a string literal

features.name: readmemh with non-literal string argument
features.description: Code should include $readmemh called with a string variable (not a string literal) as the filename argument to stress the code path that handles dynamic filename resolution
